### Post by Newbunto on 2012-05-09
Use [FONT=Courier New]nslookup[/FONT] to investigate problems with DNS.

I tried both of the servers that your post mentions and both of them failed to work for me. So the problem may be with the DNS servers. Are you sure that those are the correct IP addresses?

Try using a DNS server IP address of 8.8.8.8 (temporarily).
